paragraphs: Mutation is a new mechanic where breeding has a low chance of producing a Pal stronger than the normal breeding result. Pals born from mutated eggs have higher stats and a unique passive skill.
Mutation Eggs don't just hatch better versions of the parents, parent pairs produce completely different species with:
Mutation has exclusive list . Breed Self Pals, Tower Pals and Raid Boss Pals are not in the list.
Here is the current Mutation Calculator: Breed 2 Pals . The formula is derived from the results of many tests and may contain errors.
Mutation Passive Skills can be passed on to offspring through breeding. Don't work with Yakumo 's Birds of a Feather .
"Disposable Implant" usable at the Pal Surgery Table . It is consumed on use, but can grant more powerful passive skills.

mutation_passives.name: Babysitter
mutation_passives.description: While at a base, increases egg production speed by +30% and incubation speed by +30% for Pals assigned to a Breeding Farm.

mutation_passives.name: Idiosyncratic
mutation_passives.description: Pal and Player Auto Health Regeneration Rate +50% Defense +25% Immune to Poison Damage Immune to Burn Damage

mutation_passives.name: Immortality
mutation_passives.description: Life Steal +5% Pal Auto Health Regeneration Rate +100% Attack +15%

bullets: Work Suitability Kindling
MutationPal Passive Skills /5
Cake : has 1% Mutated Egg spawn rate
Mushroom Cake : Slightly increases the likelihood that newly born Pals will have higher stats.
Vegetable Cake : Produces two Pal Eggs at once. treat as 2%.
Extravagant Vegetable Cake : Increases the likelihood of mutations and makes stat growth more likely. Has 3% Mutated Egg spawn rate.
Special Cake : Increases the chance of inheriting multiple passive skills from Pal parents. Maximum of 6 passive skills can be transferred.
Hatch at 2 star condensation (12 pals worth)
High Level Skill of its type
Better Pal (based on breed value)
Work Suitability random +2
Immortality Life Steal +5%
Pal Auto Health Regeneration Rate +100%
Idiosyncratic Pal and Player Auto Health Regeneration Rate +50%
Babysitter : While at a base, increases egg production speed by +30% and incubation speed by +30% for Pals assigned to a Breeding Farm.
Heavily Armored : Immune to Explosion Damage
Skymarcher : Mounted Jump Count +2

Disposable Implant: Heavily Armored : Heavily Armored
